lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: Greetings friend. I am Rasolo, the famous merchant. Would you care to see my wares?

lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: As you wish. I will travel wherever the business takes me.

lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: Many thanks for returning my heirloom to me, adventurer. Would you like to buy something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost that ring you gave me...

lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: Are you sure? I don't have it anymore...

lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: Well, should you need a replacement, I suggest you free up some inventory room first...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost that ring you gave me...

lines.speaker: Rasolo
lines.text: Then by all means, take another. Only a foolish merchant would give away his only stock!

sections.title: After Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire

lines.speaker: Rasolo

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost that ring you gave me...

lines.speaker: Rasolo
